content.text: The app already has "Hello world!" via the default template. However, it's just left-aligned text at the top. Let me center it to make it look like a proper front page greeting.

lines: fun Greeting(name: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {

content.text: "Hello world!" is now centered on the front page. The app was already displaying it via the default template — I just wrapped it in a `Box` with `contentAlignment = Alignment.Center` so it appears in the middle of the screen instead of the top-left corner.
